name: Secret class
description:
￼

Hayyyyyyyyyyoooo

It's my first time ever publishing a bot so might as well start out with a bang. A 11 character bot based on the manhwa secret class. If you're here already you probably know all the characters but I'll leave the definition open because I did add a lot of things.

If this does good maybe I'll become the manhwa guy

I put an NTR tag because I can't control what you freaks do with go-bong

If you liked this bot what manga should I do next?
